title: 2024.11.14Adding payments to your LLM agentic workflowsSummary:This post discusses integrating the Stripe agent toolkit with large language models (LLMs) to enhance automation workflows, enabling financial services access, metered billing, and streamlined operations across agent frameworks.Author:Steve KaliskiTopics:AIAgenticRead
